iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 13:00 — FALLING STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Kharg Island strikes target military/oil assets, not nuclear infrastructure. US holding Kharg oil infrastructure 'hostage' to force Hormuz reopening — economic leverage, not nuclear escalation. Nuclear track continues de-escalation despite conventional escalation. Mojtaba Khamenei leadership instability a wildcard but no nuclear signals triggered. Trump rejects Putin proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia. 14% (no change).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 13:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) FIVE KC-135 REFUELING PLANES DAMAGED: Iranian missile strike on Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia — WSJ/Reuters confirmed. First direct Iranian strike destroying US aircraft on Gulf state soil. (2) CENTCOM destroyed 30+ Iranian minelaying ships + mine warehouses/manufacturing facilities. (3) 2,500 Marines heading to Middle East. (4) US Navy ships redeploying from Indo-Pacific (Nagasaki, Japan) to ME. (5) Qatar intercepted 9 ballistic missiles + drones; airspace closed. (6) Oman bypass ports (Duqm, Salalah) struck by Iranian drones, hitting fuel storage. (7) Trump rejects Putin proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia. (8) 500+ tankers still trapped, Brent above $100. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 13:00 — IMMINENT RISING. (1) Axios/JPost: Israel planning MASSIVE ground invasion — seize entire area south of Litani River. 'Largest since 2006.' (2) Israeli strike on primary healthcare center in southern Lebanon killed 12 medical personnel (The Hindu). (3) 634+ killed in Lebanon (Guardian), 800K-1M displaced. (4) Hezbollah Radwan forces raiding northern Israel. 210+ rockets since March 2. (5) Israel strikes Beirut, kills Hamas official in south Beirut. (6) Entire families 'wiped out' — Guardian detailed report. (7) Israel agreed to spare Beirut airport but NOT other infrastructure. Capped at 100.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL RISING. Third intercept confirmed March 13 — NATO spokesperson Allison Hart: 'NATO remains vigilant and stands firm in its defence of all allies.' Sirens in Adana near Incirlik. Turkey formally asked Tehran to clarify. Iran denies targeting. Politico EU: one more intercept triggers Article 4 consultations. Multiple sources (NYT, Reuters, Bloomberg, Politico, France24) confirmed. 59 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 65. ONE intercept from IMMINENT/Article 4.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India strongly condemned Pakistan airstrikes on Afghanistan, supporting Afghan sovereignty (MEA spokesperson Jaiswal). India highlighted civilian casualties including women and children during Ramadan. No military escalation signals. Qatar mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) TRUMP TEMPORARILY LIFTS RUSSIA OIL SANCTIONS amid Hormuz crisis — Europe furious. German Chancellor: 'decision is wrong, pressure on Putin should be increased.' Major economic lifeline for Russia. (2) Trump rejects Putin's proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia — Moscow's diplomatic overreach rebuffed. (3) ISW: Oil shock invalidates Russian economic pressure assumptions. (4) Russia condemns Bryansk strike as 'terrorist attack,' accuses Britain. (5) 1,278,430 total casualties, 810 killed/wounded last 24h. (6) Russia expanding drone production to 19,000/day, USF to 101,000 by April 1. 30 + 8 (sanctions waiver) + 4 (Iran coupling) = 42.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China warplane flights near Taiwan plunged from 92 to 7 over two weeks — sharpest drop in years. US THAAD fully relocated from South Korea. China appears to be exercising strategic patience while US overextends in ME. US Navy ships redeploying from Nagasaki Japan to Middle East — Indo-Pacific gap widening. $14B Taiwan arms deal awaits Trump approval ahead of Xi summit March 31. No new signals. 12 + 6 (THAAD) - 3 (reduced flights) = 15.

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING — MAJOR ESCALATION. (1) North Korea fired 10+ ballistic missiles in salvo Saturday morning March 14 — coordinated barrage from Sunan area near Pyongyang. Japan confirms ~340km range into Sea of Japan outside EEZ. (2) Timed during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills — direct provocation. (3) Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS calls it 'unprecedented pace.' (4) Launches reject Trump's dialogue outreach. (5) Bloomberg: 'more than 10' missiles — Reuters/Al Jazeera/Nikkei/Japan Times all confirm. Multiple independent confirmations. 8 + 12 (missile test) + 10 (salvo) + 5 (rhetoric) + 6 (China coupling) = 41.

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. (1) Trump temporarily lifts Russia oil sanctions — major economic lifeline, war economy benefits further from $100+ oil. Europe condemns move. (2) Zelenskyy: ME war 'bad news for Ukraine' — drawing attention and anti-aircraft missiles away. (3) Zelenskyy met Iran Shah's son in Paris, urged no Iran-Russia cooperation. (4) Russian strikes kill 4 near Kyiv, wound 15. (5) Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day, USF to 101,000 by April 1. (6) Polymarket: ceasefire by end March at 2% — effectively dead. (7) 810 Russian casualties last 24h, 1,278,430 total. 35 + 5 (Russia critical) + 5 (Turkey critical) + 5 (sanctions benefit) = 50.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — ESCALATION CONTINUES. (1) Pakistan PAF struck 51 locations in eastern Afghanistan, hit Kam Air fuel depot in Kandahar. 6 civilian deaths in latest Kabul strikes (Reuters/LA Times). (2) Afghanistan claims drone strike on Pakistan's 'Hamza' military center in Islamabad — if confirmed, unprecedented escalation hitting a capital city. Pakistan denies, says drones intercepted (India Today). (3) President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on civilian targets. (4) Afghan drones injured 4 Pakistani civilians including 2 children. (5) Both sides claim strikes on other's territory. (6) UNAMA condemned civilian casualties. (7) Pakistan calls it 'open war.' (8) Nuclear-armed state in open war remains extreme escalation risk. 10 + 10 + 8 + 7 + 5 + 15 + 2 + 8 = 78 → 81.

top_signals: US STRIKES KHARG ISLAND — Iran's oil export hub (90% of exports). CENTCOM released strike video. Trump threatens oil infrastructure next. Massive escalation (NYT/CNN/AP)
5 KC-135 REFUELING PLANES DAMAGED — Iranian missile strike on Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia. First Iranian strike destroying US aircraft on Gulf state soil (WSJ/Reuters)
IRGC THREATENS US FORCES IN UAE — Direct threat on Gulf state soil after Kharg strikes. Gulf becoming active US-Iran combat zone (Al Jazeera)
NORTH KOREA FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES in salvo during US-South Korea drills — THIRD provocation this week. 'Unprecedented pace.' Rejects Trump outreach (Reuters/Bloomberg/NK News)
TRUMP TEMPORARILY LIFTS RUSSIA OIL SANCTIONS amid Hormuz crisis — Europe furious. Major economic lifeline for Kremlin (Guardian/Reuters)
ISRAEL PLANNING MASSIVE GROUND INVASION of southern Lebanon — seize area south of Litani. 'Largest since 2006.' Healthcare center struck (Axios/The Hindu)
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: PAF strikes 51 locations. Zardari: Taliban 'crossed red line.' Drones hit near Islamabad. Both sides claim strikes on other's territory (Reuters/Hindustan Times)
CENTCOM DESTROYS 30+ IRANIAN MINE-LAYING SHIPS + mine warehouses. Oman bypass ports (Duqm, Salalah) struck by Iranian drones (ISW/NTD)

new: iran_conventional: us_refueling_planes_damaged — Five US Air Force KC-135 refueling planes struck and damaged on ground at Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia. Iranian missile strike. First direct destruction of US aircraft by Iran on Gulf state soil (WSJ/Reuters)
iran_conventional: centcom_mine_sweeping — CENTCOM destroyed 30+ Iranian minelaying ships, plus naval mine warehouses and manufacturing facilities. Mine clearing operations escalating (ISW)
iran_conventional: oman_bypass_struck — Iranian drones strike Oman's Duqm and Salalah ports — the alternative bypass routes around Strait of Hormuz. Fuel storage tank damaged at Duqm (Wikipedia/NTD)
russia: putin_uranium_rejected — Trump rejects Putin's proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia. Moscow's diplomatic overreach rebuffed — wanted to position as mediator (Reuters)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION — Day 15 13:00 SCAN. Global war probability 90% (IMMINENT). FIVE TRACKERS IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (81), Turkey near-imminent (65→71 with coupling). FOUR trackers critical (Russia, Russia-Ukraine, DPRK). NO de-escalation signals in any theater. NEW CRITICAL DEVELOPMENT: Iranian missile strike damaged 5 US KC-135 refueling planes on Saudi soil — first direct destruction of US military aircraft by Iran on Gulf state territory. CENTCOM accelerated mine warfare (30+ ships destroyed). Oman bypass ports struck — closing escape routes from Hormuz blockade. US overextension across 4+ active fronts deepening.

latest_news.headline: 5 US KC-135 refueling planes damaged in Iranian missile strike on Saudi air base
latest_news.text: Five US Air Force KC-135 refueling planes were struck and damaged on the ground at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia during an Iranian missile strike. Wall Street Journal first reported, citing two US officials. This marks the first direct Iranian strike destroying US military aircraft on Gulf state soil. Significant blow to US air operations in the theater.

latest_news.headline: CENTCOM destroys 30+ Iranian minelaying ships, mine warehouses
latest_news.text: CENTCOM announced destruction of over 30 Iranian minelaying ships and targeted naval mine warehouses and manufacturing facilities across Iran. Up from 16 destroyed as of March 10. Accelerating mine-clearing operations to reopen Strait of Hormuz shipping lanes.

latest_news.headline: Oman bypass ports struck by Iranian drones — Hormuz escape routes closing
latest_news.text: Iranian drones struck Duqm and Salalah, Oman — deep-water ports outside the Strait of Hormuz intended as bypass routes. At least one fuel storage tank damaged at Duqm. Sohar also threatened. Strikes suggest Iran targeting alternative routes to maintain oil chokepoint leverage.

latest_news.headline: Trump rejects Putin's proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia
latest_news.text: President Trump rejected Russian President Putin's proposal to transfer Iran's enriched uranium stockpile to Russia for safekeeping. Moscow positioned itself as mediator but Trump dismissed the overreach. Russia's diplomatic influence in the Iran crisis remains limited despite sanctions waiver benefits.

latest_news.headline: US strikes Kharg Island — Iran's oil export hub 'obliterated'
latest_news.text: US forces conducted 'large-scale precision strike' on Kharg Island, Iran's primary oil export hub handling 90% of oil exports. CENTCOM released strike video. Trump: 'obliterated every military target' and warned oil infrastructure could be next. Massive escalation of economic warfare.

latest_news.headline: North Korea fires 10+ ballistic missiles in salvo during US-South Korea drills
latest_news.text: North Korea fired more than 10 ballistic missiles from Sunan area near Pyongyang Saturday morning during US-South Korea 'Freedom Shield' drills. Japan confirms ~340km range into Sea of Japan outside EEZ. Third provocation this week. South Korea JCS: 'unprecedented pace of provocations.'

latest_news.headline: Israel planning massive ground invasion of southern Lebanon — seize area south of Litani
latest_news.text: Israel planning to significantly expand ground operation in Lebanon, aiming to seize entire area south of Litani River and dismantle Hezbollah military infrastructure. Described as 'largest since 2006.' 634+ killed, 800K-1M displaced. 210+ Hezbollah rockets fired into Israel since March 2.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan: PAF strikes 51 locations, Zardari says Taliban 'crossed red line'
latest_news.text: Pakistan Air Force struck 51 locations in eastern Afghanistan, hit Kam Air fuel depot in Kandahar. President Zardari declared Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on Pakistani civilian targets. Afghanistan claims drone strike hit military center in Islamabad. Nuclear-armed state in open war.

latest_news.headline: Qatar intercepts 9 ballistic missiles, airspace closed amid Iranian strikes
latest_news.text: Qatar's Armed Forces intercepted 9 ballistic missiles and multiple drones. Ras Laffan Industrial City and Mesaieed Industrial Area struck by Iranian drones. Qatar airspace closed, disrupting Hamad International Airport. First Gulf state to actively shoot down Iranian aircraft earlier in conflict.

latest_news.headline: US Navy ships redeploying from Indo-Pacific to Middle East
latest_news.text: US Navy ships currently in Nagasaki, Japan are heading to the Middle East as Iran increases attacks on the Strait of Hormuz. 2,500 Marines also en route. Indo-Pacific force posture being thinned to sustain multi-front war effort.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 90%. FIVE TRACKERS IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (100), Pakistan-Afghanistan (81), Turkey near-imminent (71 with coupling). FOUR trackers critical (Russia 50, Russia-Ukraine 55, DPRK 41). NEW CRITICAL DEVELOPMENTS: (1) 5 US KC-135 refueling planes damaged by Iranian missile strike on Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia — first direct destruction of US aircraft by Iran on Gulf state soil. (2) CENTCOM destroyed 30+ Iranian minelaying ships + manufacturing facilities — accelerating Hormuz reopening. (3) Oman bypass ports (Duqm, Salalah) struck by drones — Iran closing escape routes around Hormuz blockade. (4) Trump rejects Putin proposal to move Iranian enriched uranium to Russia. WATCH: (a) Kharg oil infrastructure strike — point of no return for Iranian oil capacity. (b) 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 consultations. (c) Lebanon ground invasion timing. (d) DPRK escalation trajectory — nuclear test risk. (e) US military overextension across 4+ active fronts — force thinning accelerating. (f) Gulf state infrastructure campaign expanding to Oman bypass routes. (g) Russia sanctions waiver geopolitical fallout.
